summary: Completed testing for Iteration 129: Pricing Cache & Trace ID features. All 21 backend API tests passed. All 15 frontend UI tests passed. Features tested: 1) Pricing Trace ID (prc_xxxxxxxx format, unique per simulation), 2) Pricing Cache (cache_hit, cache_key, latency_ms fields, cache stats endpoint, cache clear endpoint).
passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/pricing-engine/simulate returns pricing_trace_id field
✅ Trace ID format is prc_xxxxxxxx (8 hex chars after prc_ prefix)
✅ Each simulation gets a unique trace ID (5 unique IDs in test)
✅ POST /api/pricing-engine/simulate returns cache_hit field (boolean)
✅ POST /api/pricing-engine/simulate returns latency_ms field (numeric)
✅ POST /api/pricing-engine/simulate returns cache_key field (16 hex chars)
✅ First call with unique params is cache MISS (cache_hit=false)
✅ Second identical call is cache HIT (cache_hit=true)
✅ Cache HIT returns same sell_price as original calculation
✅ Cache HIT has lower latency than MISS
✅ Different parameters produce different cache keys
✅ GET /api/pricing-engine/cache/stats returns 200
✅ Cache stats includes hits, misses, active_entries, hit_rate_pct, ttl_seconds
✅ Cache stats ttl_seconds = 300
✅ POST /api/pricing-engine/cache/clear returns ok=true
✅ Cache clear resets hits/misses/active_entries to 0
✅ Cache misses count increments on new simulation
✅ Cache hits count increments on cached simulation
✅ Frontend: Trace bar (data-testid=pricing-trace-bar) shows trace_id, cache status, latency
✅ Frontend: Cache stats bar (data-testid=cache-stats-bar) shows Entries/Hits/Misses/Hit Rate/TTL
✅ Frontend: Copy trace ID button (data-testid=copy-trace-btn) is visible and clickable
✅ Frontend: Clear cache button (data-testid=clear-cache-btn) works
✅ Frontend: Refresh cache stats button (data-testid=refresh-cache-btn) works
critical_code_review_comments: PricingCache class correctly implements TTL-based caching with composite key from PricingContext
Cache key is SHA256 hash (first 16 chars) of normalized parameters including org_id, supplier, channel, agency_tier, season, promo_code
pricing_cache singleton with ttl_seconds=300 and max_size=5000
Trace ID generated with uuid.uuid4().hex[:8] prefixed with 'prc_'
Cache hit returns cached dict directly with updated trace_id and latency_ms
Cache stats endpoint returns correct metrics including hit_rate_pct calculation
Frontend TraceBar component displays trace_id, cache status (HIT/MISS), latency, and cache_key
Frontend CacheStatsBar positioned between stat cards and tabs with Yenile/Temizle buttons
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 129 tested 2 NEW features on Pricing Engine: 1) Pricing Trace ID - POST /api/pricing-engine/simulate returns pricing_trace_id (format prc_xxxxxxxx), unique per simulation for debugging. 2) Pricing Cache - in-memory cache with composite key (rate+rules+channel+agency), TTL 300s. Simulate returns cache_hit (bool), cache_key (16 hex chars), latency_ms. GET /api/pricing-engine/cache/stats returns {hits, misses, active_entries, hit_rate_pct, ttl_seconds, max_size, total_entries}. POST /api/pricing-engine/cache/clear resets all stats and entries. Frontend: TraceBar (data-testid='pricing-trace-bar') shows trace_id, cache status (HIT/MISS in green/gray), latency, cache_key. CacheStatsBar (data-testid='cache-stats-bar') shows Entries/Hits/Misses/Hit Rate/TTL with Yenile(refresh) and Temizle(clear) buttons.

api_verification.GET /api/pricing-engine/cache/stats: ✅ 200 - Returns {hits, misses, active_entries, hit_rate_pct, ttl_seconds, max_size, total_entries}

frontend_verification.Trace Bar: Dark slate bar at top of results: trace_id (prc_xxxxxxxx), cache status (HIT green / MISS gray), latency (Xms), cache_key
frontend_verification.Cache Stats Bar: Slate bar between stat cards and tabs: Entries, Hits, Misses, Hit Rate %, TTL 300s
frontend_verification.Refresh Cache Button: data-testid='refresh-cache-btn' - Yenile button in cache stats bar
frontend_verification.Clear Cache Button: data-testid='clear-cache-btn' - Temizle button (red text) in cache stats bar
frontend_verification.Copy Trace Button: data-testid='copy-trace-btn' - Clipboard icon next to trace_id, copies to clipboard

mocked_apis.note: No APIs are mocked. Cache is in-memory (Python dict) with TTL eviction. Pricing calculations use real MongoDB rules.
